message:
docs: fix broken rustdoc intra-doc links across codebase

Systematically repair rustdoc link references that were generating
warnings or broken links in generated documentation:

- Replace bare backtick function references with proper intra-doc link
  syntax (e.g., `spawn_actor` → [`spawn_actor`])
- Fix module-level disambiguation for trace and error module links
  using (mod@trace) and (mod@error) syntax
- Add explicit method cross-references with Self:: prefix for clarity
- Update lib.rs module documentation with API stability note explaining
  0.x versioning policy and referencing docs/api_audit.md
- Fix recoverability() method reference in error.rs to use full path

These changes ensure `cargo doc` runs cleanly without unresolved link
warnings and improves navigation in rustdoc-generated HTML.

Files touched: actor.rs, cli/output.rs, combinator/mod.rs, cx/cx.rs,
error.rs, lab/http/mod.rs, lib.rs, net/*.rs, obligation/*.rs, remote.rs,
runtime/*.rs, server/*.rs, supervision.rs, trace/*.rs, types/*.rs, web/*.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
